Stay cozy with FireLine™ Pro Eco recycled synthetic insulation and stay dry with recycled shell and lining fabrics featuring a moisture repellent coating without intentionally added PFAS. Lightweight enough to stuff in your pack for summer backpacking but comfortable enough for backyard campouts with the kids, this bag is so versatile and comfortable you’ll want to take it on every outing!

description: The Battle Mountain is a spacious, four-season, lightweight mountaineering tent that offers full protection in the harshest of backcountry and high-alpine conditions. The golden yellow color of the Battle Mountain was requested by Chhiring Dorje Sherpa, a Big Agnes Ambassador and friend who has summited Mount Everest 17 times. It is meant to serve as a tribute to honor the Tibetan Buddhism goddess of prosperity and good fortune, Miyo Losangma whose skin is golden yellow. The golden-colored fly is made of Dominico undyed polyester ripstop, and made with high-tenacity yarn to provide incredible tear strength and UV resistance that won’t fade in the harsh elements. With so much experience summiting 8,000+ meter peaks around the Himalaya, Chhiring’s invaluable input on the overall design, combined with his testing over the years, solidifies the Battle Mountain as one of the best mountaineering tents on the market.

description: Tactically minded and tuned for cold-weather, our mummy-style Bedrock sleeping bag has everything you need and nothing you don't. At home as much during a Rocky Mountain archery season as it is on the Northern tundra, the Bedrock’s 650 fill, RDS Certified water-repellent treated down will keep you warm when it matters most. Stoutly built with YKK #5 zippers, heat-distributing baffled construction, and accommodating frames up to 6’6”, the Bedrock is made for the elements. For no-frills, dependable functionality, look no further than the Bedrock.

Keep those toes cozy and your pack light with the outfitter-grade Benchmark sleeping bag.

description: The redesigned Big House is a big deal for car campers - the perfect portable shelter for housing the whole family under one roof. Perfect for road warriors, the Big House is designed to be tall enough to stand in, while the domed design deflects wind - keeping the structure stable in stormy weather. Large doors and an easy entry rainfly make it easy to get in and out - no small matter when you're exhausted from a day spent outside getting after it. Ample interior pockets provide plenty of organization for all your gear, and the backpack-style carry bag makes getting gear from the car to the campsite more convenient than ever. Simple enough to easily set up by headlamp after pulling up to a site late at night, and roomy enough for the whole crew to wait out a mid-afternoon rainstorm inside, the Big House is your go-to car camping oasis.

description: Blacktail tents are a tried and true Big Agnes classic - light enough for the backcountry, and strong enough for the front country. The Blacktail checks every box - lightweight design for backpackers who want a super comfortable tent after a long day on the trail, and excellent value for car campers looking for an easy to set up shelter with a small footprint. Burly recycled fabric means that you won't have to sacrifice durability for weight savings or sustainability - you get it all! Spacious sleeping areas and easy access through two side-entry doors and vestibules make early morning entry and exit with a tentmate a breeze when nature calls. No matter where your adventure takes you, camp comfy in a Blacktail!

description: The Bunk House is a full-featured, double-wall tent for three-season camping with a family or group, with a massive integrated vestibule providing extra protected space. When inclement weather keeps you from venturing out, this tent offers plenty of room for indoor activities and generous storage space to keep your gear dry. A full coverage rainfly means superior weather protection, even when it's raining sideways. Ample interior pockets provide plenty of organization for all your gear, and the backpack-style carry bag makes getting gear from the car to the campsite more convenient than ever. You’ll be amazed at how the Bunk House tent garners more ‘tent-envy’ than anything else at the campground.

description: Unlock a new level of comfort around the campsite with the Camp Quillow. With the versatile Camp Quillow, easily convert between a quilt for staying cozy by the fire, and a pillow for quality backcountry rest. For maximum warmth in quilt mode use the corner hand pockets to wrap it around your shoulders. For hands-free use, fasten the clip to wear the quilt as a cape, keeping you warm while you're up and about. When you're ready for bed stuff it into the integrated pocket to use it as a comfy camp pillow!

description: Master your sleep setup with our warmest and most luxurious four-season air chamber pad - the Campmeister Deluxe. On top, an ultra-comfortable and super-quiet quilted stretch top provides a cushioned, pillow-soft sleeping surface for maximum sleep-ins, and inside an incredible Insulation R-Value of 7 is ready for even the coldest backcountry winter nights. You'll sleep soundly season after season as the burly 70D recycled nylon fabric and aviation-grade TPU lamination work together to keep leaks at bay. Perfect for when you're not willing to compromise between lightweight, warm, durable, and packable, the Campmeister Deluxe Insulated is the ultimate in backcountry comfort!

description: Our award-winning ultralight bikepacking tents are built for on and off-road adventures with features you know from our best-selling line of Copper Spur UL tents - including massive interior volume and stronger, lighter, more sustainably sourced fabrics. The Copper Spur UL Bikepack tent is enhanced and equipped with all the functions you need for two-wheeled travel, plus a few extras like the awning-style vestibules and our proprietary TipLok™ Tent Buckle™ to simplify setup. Featuring a shortened 12" Shortstik Poleset for optimal handlebar, pannier, and saddlebag storage, complete with a burly bikepacking-ready compression sack that attaches readily to your bike with integrated daisy chain webbing. Stash your helmet in the added webbing located on the tent body exterior and dry out wet clothes and gear on daisy chain webbing loops integrated on the fly exterior. Interior storage solutions utilize dead space above your feet and keep gear stowed and out of the way. Extended footprint creates a vestibule floor for dry, dirt-free changing and additional gear storage (sold separately). The Copper Spur UL Bikepack tent is your dedicated shelter for single-track and double-track, overnight adventures.

Add on the Accessory Mesh Insert and up to four Accessory Walls (both sold separately) for even more protection and privacy.

description: "The features you know from our award-winning line of Tiger Wall UL tents have been enhanced and equipped with functions you need for two-wheeled travel. Now using solution-dyed fabric that is highly resistant to UV fade and drastically reduces energy consumption and water use during manufacturing, a process that is better for the environment and improves the quality of the tent fabric. Built for on and off road adventures, the Tiger Wall UL2 and UL3 Bikepack tents are our lightest two-door, two-vestibule bikepacking tents and an exciting addition to our ultralight bikepacking tent series. Featuring a shortened 12"" Shortstik Poleset for optimal handlebar, pannier, and saddlebag storage, complete with a burly bikepacking-ready compression sack that attaches readily to your bike with integrated daisy chain webbing. Stash your helmet in the added webbing located on the tent body exterior and dry out wet clothes and gear on daisy chain webbing loops integrated on the fly exterior. Interior storage solutions utilize dead space above your feet and keep gear stowed and out of the way. Extended footprint creates a vestibule floor for dry, dirt-free changing and additional gear storage (sold separately). Equipped with our proprietary TipLok™ Tent Buckle™ to simplify setup, the Tiger Wall UL Bikepack tent is your go-to shelter for single-track and double-track, overnight adventures."

description: Kids grow, and so does the Torchlight EXP Youth! The Torchlight EXP Youth 20 degree junior sleeping bag is a warm, cozy Big Agnes PadLok™ Sleep System bag with packable down insulation that will grow with your lil' camper from tot to teen. Offering a customizable fit system for both length and width, the this versatile bag can be sized down to keep your littlest snug as a bug. As they grow, simply unclip the loop and closure for more room and space as needed. If they need some wiggle room, unzip the expandable side panels to give them just as much extra space as they want! When you get home, cinch up the attached REM Storage Sleve and pack in your bag for storage - no need to keep track of loose storage sacks. Give them comfort that will keep up with them and feed their love for the outdoors, with the Torchlight EXP Youth!

Lightweight enough to stuff in your pack for summer backpacking but comfortable enough for backyard campouts with the kids, this bag is so versatile and comfortable you’ll want to take it on every outing!

description: Built to maximize vestibule area for shared common space or gear storage, the Wyoming Trail 2 tent provides double-wall protection with plenty of room to hang out under cover. The Wyoming Trail 2 is your new favorite three-season, freestanding, multi-use shelter for bikepacking, adventure moto missions, car camping and beyond.
